TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_life_Kuatu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: sua tia sua tia karimaku ia.
S.PHON: sua tia sua tia kar~ɾimaku ia.
S.FORM: sua tia sua tia karimaku ia.
S.PHON: sua tia sua tia kar~ɾimaku ia.
S.TRANSL: 我要說的是……
What I am going to talk is...

S.FORM: teku poisua cani piningamaku miana.
S.PHON: teku poisua ʦani piniŋamaku miana.
S.FORM: teku poisua cani piningamaku miana.
S.PHON: teku poisua ʦani piniŋamaku miana.
S.TRANSL: 我要講我以前的家庭.
I am going to say about my previous family.

S.FORM: aranaiku miana er mecocua ma er 'arupara mataa 'Angai.
S.PHON: ar~ɾanaiku miana er~ɾ meʦoʦua ma er~ɾ ʔar~ɾupar~ɾa mataa ʔaŋai.
S.FORM: aranaiku miana er mecocua ma er 'arupara mataa 'Angai.
S.PHON: ar~ɾanaiku miana er~ɾ meʦoʦua ma er~ɾ ʔar~ɾupar~ɾa mataa ʔaŋai.
S.TRANSL: 我從以前,跟Angai結婚.
I got married with 'Angai in the past.

S.FORM: 'akiacu mamarangin 'Angai mecocuakim mamia.
S.PHON: ʔakiaʦu mamar~ɾaŋin ʔaŋai meʦoʦuakim mamia.
S.FORM: 'akiacu mamarangin 'Angai mecocuakim mamia.
S.PHON: ʔakiaʦu mamar~ɾaŋin ʔaŋai meʦoʦuakim mamia.
S.TRANSL: 'Angai的父母過世了;只有我們兩個在一起.
'Angai's parents had died; only we two were together.

W.TRANSL: 主焦-兩人一起行動=1EPL.主格

S.FORM: er arane miana miaranasʉkia mo'uma.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ar~ɾane miana miar~ɾanasɨkia moʔuma.
S.FORM: er arane miana miaranasʉkia mo'uma.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ar~ɾane miana miar~ɾanasɨkia moʔuma.

TRANSL.notes: 從以前開始,我(們)就很困苦的作農.

S.TRANSL: 從以前開始,我 就很困苦的作農.

TRANSL.notes: Since the past, I (we) have been tough transplanting seedlings.

S.TRANSL: Since the past, I have been tough transplanting seedlings.

S.FORM: u no mia 'unacikia manu ia miaranasʉkia putukikio sii nuu ca'ania ia tumatang manu.
S.PHON: u no mia ʔunaʦikia manu ia miar~ɾanasɨkia putukikio sii nuu ʦaʔania ia tumataŋ manu.
S.FORM: u no mia 'unacikia manu ia miaranasʉkia putukikio sii nuu ca'ania ia tumatang manu.
S.PHON: u no mia ʔunaʦikia manu ia miar~ɾanasɨkia putukikio sii nuu ʦaʔania ia tumataŋ manu.
S.TRANSL: 當我有了孩子的時候,我很困苦的工作,因為白天的時候小孩子在哭泣.
When I got the children, I was tough working, because the children cried during the daytime.

S.FORM: macici taniarʉ ia 'esi tumatang manu.
S.PHON: maʦiʦi taniar~ɾɨ ia ʔesi tumataŋ manu.
S.FORM: macici taniarʉ ia 'esi tumatang manu.
S.PHON: maʦiʦi taniar~ɾɨ ia ʔesi tumataŋ manu.
S.TRANSL: 太陽很熱,小孩子在哭泣.
The sun was hot and the children was crying.

S.FORM: nuu 'umo'ucanin ia miaranasʉkia sii 'akia taru'an.
S.PHON: nuu ʔumoʔuʦanin ia miar~ɾanasɨkia sii ʔakia tar~ɾuʔan.
S.FORM: nuu 'umo'ucanin ia miaranasʉkia sii 'akia taru'an.
S.PHON: nuu ʔumoʔuʦanin ia miar~ɾanasɨkia sii ʔakia tar~ɾuʔan.
S.TRANSL: 如果下雨的話,我很困苦,因為沒有工寮.
If it rained I was tough, because there were no workmen's huts.

S.FORM: er makasua er miaranasʉ putukikio.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makasua er~ɾ miar~ɾanasɨ putukikio.
S.FORM: er makasua er miaranasʉ putukikio.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makasua er~ɾ miar~ɾanasɨ putukikio.
S.TRANSL: 那樣困苦的工作.
was tough in that way.

S.FORM: er tatiacu manu arʉncu cau.
S.PHON: er~ɾ tatiaʦu manu ar~ɾɨnʦu ʦau.
S.FORM: er tatiacu manu arʉncu cau.
S.PHON: er~ɾ tatiaʦu manu ar~ɾɨnʦu ʦau.
S.TRANSL: 孩子長大了,別人娶走了.
The children grew up, and they were taken by others.

S.FORM: er 'akia manumaku sarunei kara kaira nannakʉ.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ʔakia manumaku sar~ɾunei kar~ɾa kair~ɾa nannakɨ.
S.FORM: er 'akia manumaku sarunei kara kaira nannakʉ.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ʔakia manumaku sar~ɾunei kar~ɾa kair~ɾa nannakɨ.
S.TRANSL: 我沒有男孩,都是女的.
I don't have boys; all are girls.

S.FORM: arʉncu cau kangvang 'ecikim mamia mecocua mataa rʉ'ʉvʉmaku.
S.PHON: ar~ɾɨnʦu ʦau kaŋvaŋ ʔeʦikim mamia meʦoʦua mataa r~ɾɨʔɨvɨmaku.
S.FORM: arʉncu cau kangvang 'ecikim mamia mecocua mataa rʉ'ʉvʉmaku.
S.PHON: ar~ɾɨnʦu ʦau kaŋvaŋ ʔeʦikim mamia meʦoʦua mataa r~ɾɨʔɨvɨmaku.

TRANSL.notes: 所有(小孩)都被人娶走了,就只有和我的伴侶,我們兩個人在一起.

S.TRANSL: 所有 都被人娶走了,就只有和我的伴侶,我們兩個人在一起.

TRANSL.notes: (My children) were all taken away by others, we two were together, only (I) and my mate.

S.TRANSL: were all taken away by others, we two were together, only and my mate.

S.FORM: er makasua marangcukia.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makasua mar~ɾaŋʦukia.
S.FORM: er makasua marangcukia.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makasua mar~ɾaŋʦukia.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣,我老了.
In that way, I turned old.

S.FORM: miaranasʉ putukikio 'akia moran sii niarʉcu cau kangvang mamanmaku.
S.PHON: miar~ɾanasɨ putukikio ʔakia mor~ɾan sii niar~ɾɨʦu ʦau kaŋvaŋ mamanmaku.
S.FORM: miaranasʉ putukikio 'akia moran sii niarʉcu cau kangvang mamanmaku.
S.PHON: miar~ɾanasɨ putukikio ʔakia mor~ɾan sii niar~ɾɨʦu ʦau kaŋvaŋ mamanmaku.

TRANSL.notes: 我很困苦的工作,沒有(人)幫(我),因為我的小孩全部被娶走了.

S.TRANSL: 我很困苦的工作,沒有 幫 ,因為我的小孩全部被娶走了.

TRANSL.notes: I was tough working, and no (one) helped (me), because my kids had all been taken by others.

S.TRANSL: I was tough working, and no helped , because my kids had all been taken by others.

S.FORM: er makahua putukikiokia nuu nuu er miana ia cumacancukia avʉʉn manu cumacancu.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makahua putukikiokia nuu nuu er~ɾ miana ia ʦumaʦanʦukia avɨɨn manu ʦumaʦanʦu.
S.FORM: er makahua putukikiokia nuu nuu er miana ia cumacancukia avʉʉn manu cumacancu.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makahua putukikiokia nuu nuu er~ɾ miana ia ʦumaʦanʦukia avɨɨn manu ʦumaʦanʦu.

TRANSL.notes: 我(們)那樣的工作,以前呢,我(們)插秧,揹著小孩插秧.

S.TRANSL: 我 那樣的工作,以前呢,我 插秧,揹著小孩插秧.
We worked in that way; in the past we transplanted seedlings, children being carried on the back.

S.FORM: 'apanapen 'apanapa nuu tia matapari'i manu sii avʉʉn avʉʉn na kukuca.
S.PHON: ʔapanapen ʔapanapa nuu tia matapar~ɾiʔi manu sii avɨɨn avɨɨn na kukuʦa.
S.FORM: 'apanapen 'apanapa nuu tia matapari'i manu sii avʉʉn avʉʉn na kukuca.
S.PHON: ʔapanapen ʔapanapa nuu tia matapar~ɾiʔi manu sii avɨɨn avɨɨn na kukuʦa.
S.TRANSL: 因為是背在後面,有時候小孩會掉下來.

TRANSL.notes: Because (the children) were carried on the back, sometimes the children would fall down.

S.TRANSL: Because were carried on the back, sometimes the children would fall down.

S.FORM: ah aka cʉpʉng tecikia manan putukikio sii makahua manu um 'esi tumatang.
S.PHON: ah aka ʦɨpɨŋ teʦikia manan putukikio sii makahua manu um ʔesi tumataŋ.
S.FORM: ah aka cʉpʉng tecikia manan putukikio sii makahua manu um 'esi tumatang.
S.PHON: ah aka ʦɨpɨŋ teʦikia manan putukikio sii makahua manu um ʔesi tumataŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 因為小孩子那樣哭著,(我)心裡很難過;我要怎麼工作?

S.TRANSL: 因為小孩子那樣哭著, 心裡很難過;我要怎麼工作?
Because the children were crying in such a way, I felt sad; how could I work?

S.FORM: er makahuakia miaranasʉ aratatiacu manu mama'aricu um matarava mamisa masin.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makahuakia miar~ɾanasɨ ar~ɾatatiaʦu manu mamaʔar~ɾiʦu um matar~ɾava mamisa masin.
S.FORM: er makahuakia miaranasʉ aratatiacu manu mama'aricu um matarava mamisa masin.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makahuakia miar~ɾanasɨ ar~ɾatatiaʦu manu mamaʔar~ɾiʦu um matar~ɾava mamisa masin.

TRANSL.notes: 我那樣困苦著.小孩變大了,到了現在,(狀況)就稍好了.

S.TRANSL: 我那樣困苦著.小孩變大了,到了現在, 就稍好了.

TRANSL.notes: I was tough in that way. The children have grown up; at the moment (the condition) is better.

S.TRANSL: I was tough in that way. The children have grown up; at the moment is better.

S.FORM: er 'ecikia mamia mecocua mataa rʉ'ʉvʉ sii.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ʔeʦikia mamia meʦoʦua mataa r~ɾɨʔɨvɨ sii.
S.FORM: er 'ecikia mamia mecocua mataa rʉ'ʉvʉ sii.
S.PHON: er~ɾ ʔeʦikia mamia meʦoʦua mataa r~ɾɨʔɨvɨ sii.

S.FORM: pipining kangvang ha maman takacicincu marinupasʉ.
S.PHON: pipiniŋ kaŋvaŋ ha maman takaʦiʦinʦu mar~ɾinupasɨ.
S.FORM: pipining kangvang ha maman takacicincu marinupasʉ.
S.PHON: pipiniŋ kaŋvaŋ ha maman takaʦiʦinʦu mar~ɾinupasɨ.
S.TRANSL: 我只有跟我的伴侶兩人在一起,因為我的小孩們都在外頭獨自賺錢.
I was together with my mate in that way, because all of my childred were outside earning money by ourselves.

S.FORM: nuu matarava nuu kaisisin cina ia iavatu tanasa maman ara.
S.PHON: nuu matar~ɾava nuu kaisisin ʦina ia iavatu tanasa maman ar~ɾa.
S.FORM: nuu matarava nuu kaisisin cina ia iavatu tanasa maman ara.
S.PHON: nuu matar~ɾava nuu kaisisin ʦina ia iavatu tanasa maman ar~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 若到了媽媽的節日,小孩就來到家.
When Mother's Day came, the children came home.

S.FORM: um movua nupasʉ tia 'urupacamu cina cuma sii 'ancikim tavarʉ'ʉ mon kamua.
S.PHON: um movua nupasɨ tia ʔur~ɾupaʦamu ʦina ʦuma sii ʔanʦikim tavar~ɾɨʔɨ mon kamua.
S.FORM: um movua nupasʉ tia 'urupacamu cina cuma sii 'ancikim tavarʉ'ʉ mon kamua.
S.PHON: um movua nupasɨ tia ʔur~ɾupaʦamu ʦina ʦuma sii ʔanʦikim tavar~ɾɨʔɨ mon kamua.

TRANSL.notes: 「(這些錢)是要給媽媽爸爸你們使用的金錢,因為我們不能住你們那裡.

S.TRANSL: 「 是要給媽媽爸爸你們使用的金錢,因為我們不能住你們那裡.

TRANSL.notes: "(We) give money to you mother and father to use, because we cannot live in your place.

S.TRANSL: " give money to you mother and father to use, because we cannot live in your place.

S.FORM: sii 'ekia pipining kavanvantuku.
S.PHON: sii ʔekia pipiniŋ kavanvantuku.
S.FORM: sii 'ekia pipining kavanvantuku.
S.PHON: sii ʔekia pipiniŋ kavanvantuku.
S.TRANSL: 因為我們在外面賺錢.
Because we are earning money outside.

S.FORM: er makasuacu mama'aricu cʉpʉng nuu makasuin.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makasuaʦu mamaʔar~ɾiʦu ʦɨpɨŋ nuu makasuin.
S.FORM: er makasuacu mama'aricu cʉpʉng nuu makasuin.
S.PHON: er~ɾ makasuaʦu mamaʔar~ɾiʦu ʦɨpɨŋ nuu makasuin.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣了.如果那樣的話,心裡就舒坦了.
The condition was like so. In that way, my heart would be relieved.

S.FORM: marangcikia pairacu mamia musukom.
S.PHON: mar~ɾaŋʦikia pair~ɾaʦu mamia musukom.
S.FORM: marangcikia pairacu mamia musukom.
S.PHON: mar~ɾaŋʦikia pair~ɾaʦu mamia musukom.
S.TRANSL: 我老了,只會經常生病.

TRANSL.notes: I am already old (and) can only get sick often.

S.TRANSL: I am already old can only get sick often.

S.FORM: akacu tina'an 'ancikia tavarʉ'ʉ putukikio.
S.PHON: akaʦu tinaʔan ʔanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ putukikio.
S.FORM: akacu tina'an 'ancikia tavarʉ'ʉ putukikio.
S.PHON: akaʦu tinaʔan ʔanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ putukikio.
S.TRANSL: 身體不好了,我不能工作了.

TRANSL.notes: (Because) my body is not well, I cannot work.

S.TRANSL: my body is not well, I cannot work.

S.FORM: makasuacu mamia aranai mia tatingikia makasicu mamarurangcikia.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu mamia ar~ɾanai mia tatiŋikia makasiʦu mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.FORM: makasuacu mamia aranai mia tatingikia makasicu mamarurangcikia.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu mamia ar~ɾanai mia tatiŋikia makasiʦu mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋʦikia.
S.TRANSL: 只有那樣了.從我年紀小,就這樣一直到我老了.
Simply in that way. I am aged from the time of youth this way.

S.FORM: aka cʉpʉng sii 'ancikia tavarʉ'ʉ putukikio.
S.PHON: aka ʦɨpɨŋ sii ʔanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ putukikio.
S.FORM: aka cʉpʉng sii 'ancikia tavarʉ'ʉ putukikio.
S.PHON: aka ʦɨpɨŋ sii ʔanʦikia tavar~ɾɨʔɨ putukikio.
S.TRANSL: 心裡很難過,因為我不能工作了.
I feel sad because I cannot work.

S.FORM: er nʉkai mamisa ia mama'aricu sii u su cʉngfu ia vʉʉncikia mamarurang um nupasʉ tia 'urupacaa mamarurang mama'aricu cʉpʉng nuu pacʉpʉcʉpʉng.
S.PHON: er~ɾ nɨkai mamisa ia mamaʔar~ɾiʦu sii u su ʦɨŋfu ia vɨɨnʦikia mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ um nupasɨ tia ʔur~ɾupaʦaa mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ mamaʔar~ɾiʦu ʦɨpɨŋ nuu paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋ.
S.FORM: er nʉkai mamisa ia mama'aricu sii u su cʉngfu ia vʉʉncikia mamarurang um nupasʉ tia 'urupacaa mamarurang mama'aricu cʉpʉng nuu pacʉpʉcʉpʉng.
S.PHON: er~ɾ nɨkai mamisa ia mamaʔar~ɾiʦu sii u su ʦɨŋfu ia vɨɨnʦikia mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ um nupasɨ tia ʔur~ɾupaʦaa mamar~ɾur~ɾaŋ mamaʔar~ɾiʦu ʦɨpɨŋ nuu paʦɨpɨʦɨpɨŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 但是最近呢,好一點了,因為政府給我(們)老人家,老人家要使用的金錢,若想起來,心裡就舒坦了.

S.TRANSL: 但是最近呢,好一點了,因為政府給我 老人家,老人家要使用的金錢,若想起來,心裡就舒坦了.
But recently, the condition is getting better, because the government gives us the elderly money, which we can use; when I think of that, my heart gets relieved.
